mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user_profiles ( id, last_name, first_name, last_name_kana, first_name_kana, gender, zip_code, address, street_number, address_kana, street_number_kana, birth_date, phone_number, emergency_name, emergency_phone ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{lastName}, #{firstName}, #{lastNameKana}, #{firstNameKana}, #{gender}, #{zipCode}, #{address}, #{streetNumber}, #{addressKana}, #{streetNumberKana}, #{birthDate}, #{phoneNumber}, #{emergencyName}, #{emergencyPhone} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user_profiles SET last_name = #{lastName}, first_name = #{firstName}, last_name_kana = #{lastNameKana}, first_name_kana = #{firstNameKana}, gender = #{gender}, zip_code = #{zipCode}, address = #{address}, street_number = #{streetNumber}, address_kana = #{addressKana}, street_number_kana = #{streetNumberKana}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, phone_number = #{phoneNumber}, emergency_name = #{emergencyName}, emergency_phone = #{emergencyPhone} WHERE id = #{id}
